title: 12 Days of Christmas Crackers - 12" Festive Xmas Robin Holiday Dinner Table Decorations Red White Green Gold - Family Game Novelty Fun Prizes Gifts Contains Hats Jokes
features: This set of twelve 12" Christmas crackers is beautifully crafted from grey printed board with colourful bases in red, white, and green, all finished with elegant gold ribbon ties for a festive and eye-catching display.
Inspired by the beloved “Twelve Days of Christmas” theme, these crackers bring a coordinated and traditional look to your holiday table, adding both charm and seasonal style to festive gatherings.

Each cracker contains the classic favourites including a colourful paper hat, a light-hearted motto or joke, and the traditional snap, ensuring plenty of laughter and a joyful festive moment for all ages.
Alongside the traditional contents, every cracker holds a surprise gift from a wide-ranging assortment such as a bottle opener, sudoku puzzle, jigsaw, toy plane, marbles, thimble, tweezers, and more.
Perfect for family dinners, festive parties, or as a decorative highlight to seasonal celebrations, this pack of twelve crackers combines style, variety, and fun for a memorable Christmas occasion.
description: Product Description Celebrate Christmas with Twelve Festive Crackers Bring colour, charm and tradition to your table with this beautiful set of twelve 12-inch crackers. Inspired by the “12 Days of Christmas” theme, each cracker includes a hat, motto, snap and a mixed surprise gift, offering fun, variety and festive excitement for every guest. A Festive Set Inspired by the Twelve Days of Christmas Create a magical Christmas tablescape with this coordinated set of twelve decorative crackers, each featuring a number and illustration from the classic “12 Days of Christmas” theme. Complete with hats, mottos, snaps and mixed gifts, they bring joyful surprises to every celebration. A Fun Mix of Surprise Gifts Inside Every Cracker Each cracker contains a surprise gift chosen from a varied selection to suit all ages. From puzzles and keyrings to nail tools, marbles, clips, tape measures and more, every pull reveals something different—adding excitement and playful variety to your festive celebrations. Gifts may vary.
